title: Aizawl, Mizoram — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Aizawl, Mizoram: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Aizawl is a city in Mizoram with a population of 400,000. The capital of Mizoram, a hill city in northeast India known for its high literacy rate, scenic landscapes, and vibrant tribal culture.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
